overall.description: A cinematic scene from the video game Hogwarts Legacy depicting students in wizard robes walking through the Great Hall of Hogwarts. The hall features Gothic stone architecture, long wooden dining tables, and dramatic morning light streaming through tall arched windows, creating patterned shadows on the stone floor.

events.description: student wearing striped scarf begins walking around the wooden table
student with scarf approaches the left side of the hall near the windows

agents.ego_description: standing in the great hall observing other students walking and sitting at the dining tables

notable_agents.action: student wearing striped scarf walking around the dining tables
student sitting at the table in the background

entered.detail: large stone archway forming the entrance to the hall section
long wooden tables with attached benches arranged in rows
tall gothic windows with multiple panes letting in morning light
ornate iron chandelier hanging from the vaulted ceiling
thick stone pillars supporting the hall structure

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in the Great Hall with warm morning light streaming through tall gothic windows. A student wearing a striped scarf walks around the wooden dining tables while other students sit in the background. The camera remains stationary, capturing the stone architecture and the patterned light on the marble floor.

events.description: student with striped scarf exits the frame to the left
group of new students enters from the right foreground

agents.ego_description: continuing to observe the activity in the great hall as new students enter the view

notable_agents.action: group of students in dark robes walking through the foreground
student walking past the camera toward the back of the hall

segments.scene_description: After the student with the scarf exits left, the focus shifts to other students moving through the hall. A group of students enters from the right, walking past the camera, while the gothic architecture and warm lighting remain constant. The hall maintains its atmosphere of quiet activity.

segments_fixes: segment[0]: agents.pedestrian_behavior: 'mixed - some walking, some sitting at tables' -> 'walking'

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a steady gaze within the Great Hall as the focus shifts from a single passing student to a broader flow of activity. It begins with warm morning light streaming through tall gothic windows, casting patterned shadows across the marble floor while a student in a striped scarf walks past the wooden dining tables. As this student exits the frame to the left, the camera maintains its stationary position, allowing the quiet atmosphere of the stone architecture to linger. The scene then expands its focus to a group of students entering from the right, who move past the lens to fill the space. Finally, the shot settles into a rhythm of collective movement, blending the constant golden lighting with the steady transit of students through the hall.
